post_install.subtitle: ONCard 1.4.7 adds MCQ support and keeps expanding NNA so it can serve the whole app with a more uniform study experience.
post_install.text1: MCQ is the main focus of this update. Studying becomes more interactive, easier to start, and easier to understand because AI can break down what you got right and wrong.
post_install.summary_text: We also customized more pipelines, including FTC and image processing pipelines, to help generation across FTC and Ask AI feel more connected.
post_install.text2:
MCQ study keeps the flow simple: choose an answer, get feedback, and let AI explain what went right or wrong. The goal is to make each session feel easier, more interactive, and more useful for understanding the subject you want to learn.

Still in beta. Marks will be either 10 or 0. I am working on a better grading system for MCQs.

whats_new.title: Study With MCQs
whats_new.description: ONCard 1.4.7 makes studying more interactive with MCQ support and deeper AI feedback.
points: Study with MCQs when you want quick, focused practice.
AI helps break down what you did right and wrong so you can understand the subject better.
NNA is more uniform across the app, helping study features work together more naturally.
FTC and image processing pipelines were customized to improve generation for FTC and Ask AI.
